title: Medusa — Brute-Force & Password Auditing
desc: Complete guide to Medusa covering all 25+ protocol modules — SSH, FTP, HTTP, SMB, RDP, MySQL, Telnet, SNMP, VNC, LDAP, and more. Includes real lab scenarios and AV evasion techniques.

title: Wireshark — Complete Packet Analysis
desc: Master network traffic capture and analysis. Covers display filters, protocol dissection, detecting attacks live, extracting credentials from PCAPs, and building forensic evidence.

title: NMAP — Network Scanning & Recon
desc: The definitive NMAP reference — host discovery, port scanning techniques, service and OS fingerprinting, NSE scripting engine, and firewall evasion strategies.

title: John The Ripper — Password Cracking
desc: From installation to advanced cracking — dictionary attacks, incremental mode, custom rules, hash identification, and cracking real-world hash formats including NTLM, bcrypt, and SHA.

title: Autopsy — Digital Forensics Guide
desc: Complete digital forensics workflow with Autopsy — disk image acquisition, file carving, timeline analysis, keyword search, artefact recovery, and writing court-admissible reports.

title: SET — Social Engineering Toolkit Field Guide
desc: Master the Social-Engineer Toolkit — phishing campaigns, credential harvesting, web cloning, spear-phishing vectors, and building effective security awareness programs.

title: Wash — Cybersecurity Fundamentals
desc: Core cybersecurity concepts, threat models, and practical security hardening techniques for students entering the field — the foundation every ethical hacker needs.
